workItem.title: Confirm candidate HEAD durability before reviews and evidence

## Context

A recovered delivery run referenced repair commits in passed EvidenceReports and reviews, but those commits had never been pushed to the canonical work branch. After the X1 service restarted, the workspace was reconstructed from an older remote branch head and the accepted repairs disappeared while their audit events remained.

## Expected outcome

Symphony externalizes every implementation and repair candidate HEAD to the canonical remote branch before recording exact-commit evidence or launching reviewers, and recovery fails closed when ledger references cannot be reconstructed from GitHub.

## Scope

- Add a candidate durability gate after implementation and every repair turn
- Push the exact local HEAD to the canonical Issue branch using guarded non-force semantics
- Confirm the remote branch resolves to the exact candidate SHA before reviewers and evidence
- On recovery compare run head, audit references, local HEAD and remote branch head
- Resume the durable candidate or start a repair attempt without silently regressing
- Record candidate publication intent and confirmed result through bos-mcp
- Add restart tests proving repair commits survive complete local workspace loss

## Out of scope

- Force-push over a divergent remote branch
- Treat local-only commits as durable evidence
- Store source commits in the audit branch

## Acceptance criteria

- No reviewer starts until the exact candidate HEAD is confirmed on the remote Issue branch
- No EvidenceReport can pass for a commit that is absent from canonical GitHub refs
- Every repair cycle republishes and confirms its new exact HEAD before independent review
- A simulated X1 loss after repair recreates the same candidate commit without losing changes
- Remote divergence blocks safely and never force-pushes
- Recovery detects historical evidence that references an unavailable commit and requests corrective repair
- Complete Symphony tests, coverage, static analysis and recovery suites pass
